summary: TrailTimeline.vue · DUMB virtualized timeline · props { events, rowHeight?, overscan? } · emits row-selected. Filter chips for kind + lane (multi-select toggle) · date range inputs · reset. Virtualization: scrollTop -> firstVisibleIndex with overscan, only renders the window slice via translateY. Caller responsible for shaping trail.jsonl into TimelineEvent rows (lane resolution + summary formatting belong in a thin parent wiring layer per §Dumb-components).

validation.evidence: no fetch/axios/setInterval in <script setup>; only window resize listener for viewport height
firstVisibleIndex/lastVisibleIndex computed from scrollTop · windowSlice slices visible · spacer height = total
